diagnostic_explanation: Both reviewers kept the claim supported and used the same reason code and confidence. The only difference is that option 1 cites both no replication and unknown scope, while option 2 cites only no replication. For the specific limitation claim 'hold_generalization_pending_replication,' evidence of no replication alone is sufficient to support the frozen label, and the added unknown-scope citation in option 1 is complementary but not necessary. Thus the citation difference is best understood as one reviewer using a broader equivalent subset of supporting evidence rather than a materially different rationale.
